finding: Plan stays within roadmap tools scope — blueprint + 5 tool fixes. No scope leak to Postgres, i18n, IPC, or plugins.
Changes are minimal — each tool fix is 2-5 lines. The blueprint is derived from existing active.v1.json data. Total surface area ~130 new lines across 6 files.
All changes are additive or provide fallbacks. Fallback to active.v1.json when blueprint missing is safer than crashing. Optional params are backward compatible. No logic is removed — only expanded.
